input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Tidal AI (conf=0.62). AVOID casual tone. Expected phrasing tier: inquiry.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'casual' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-015] Conf=0.62 → inquiry. Casual tone drift: emoji, slang, excessive exclamation.
